title: Vera Bradley (VRA) Misses Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Vera Bradley reported Q2 2023 consolidated net revenues of $130.4 million compared to $147 million in the prior-year second quarter, representing a decline. Consolidated net income totaled $2.4 million or $0.08 per diluted share compared to $9.5 million or $0.28 per diluted share in the prior year, a significant decline in profitability. The company experienced gross margin pressures due to logistics costs. However, the company drove product innovation and completed share repurchases while maintaining a debt-free balance sheet. Inflationary pressures, especially higher gas prices, continued to negatively impact traffic and spending in Vera Bradley factory stores. For the full fiscal year 2023 outlook, Vera Bradley expected consolidated net revenues of $480 million to $490 million compared to $540.5 million in fiscal 2022.
